name: NATIONAL INDEPENDENT COAL OPERATORS' ASSOCIATION et al. v. KLEPPE, SECRETARY OF THE INTERIOR, et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in NATIONAL INDEPENDENT COAL OPERATORS' ASSOCIATION et al. v. KLEPPE, SECRETARY OF THE INTERIOR, et al. (423 U.S. 388, 1975 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
